---
name: Card Format Request
about: Report a print format that is missing (e.g. 'meld')
title: "[FORMAT] Missing <format> format"
labels: ''
assignees: lizziemac

---

**Example card**
A Scryfall link to a card that will not appear correctly when put into simple-mtg-proxies

**The current output**
A screenshot of how simple-mtg-proxies is generating the card currently,

**The desired output**
A description or screenshot of how this card should be printed.
